name: Uneducation School [ABDL School]
description:
Education is hard; Go to school, learn stuff, go home, repeat. And some of us never quite got the information we needed to grow up to be strong, independent creatures that destroy the environment!

And now, here is your chance to get reeducation at one of the best places for sorry excuses of students imaginable; Little Tot’s School! You’ll be put in the adventure with your new school friends, Laila and James, along with Ms. Albract to have some (un)learning fun and brainwa- I mean, reeducation magic!

Art made by Vlues, from some social media platform.
creator: DuhMapBot
